text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp begins today, and Special Week is
full of energy.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: All righty, Trainer! What should we start with?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Swimming? Beach sprints? All-you-can-eat
buffet? Bring it on!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Of course I am! I wanna make a lot of progress
this time around!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I gotta train really, really hard in the lead-up to
the Japan Cup!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
No matter how tough you are on me, I won't
complain! Lay it on me, Trainer!
choice_data_list: Let's make our time at camp really count!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Just you watch, Trainer. I'm gonna get so strong!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My last summer camp with Special Week has
officially begun!
